title: Practice Menu Tacit Preview Enhancement
goal: Expand /practice/menu/:menuId from a step-summary list into a compact text-first tacit preview using the already-fetched PracticeMenuBundle, without changing practice store/runtime/query boundaries or sim/admin flows.
constraints: Keep src/stores/practiceStore.ts, src/lib/practice/runtime.ts, src/lib/practice/queries.ts, src/types/practice.ts, src/lib/practice/sessionView.ts, router, sim pages, and admin flows unchanged unless a blocker is proven from code
Derive menu preview only from the existing PracticeMenuBundle already loaded by PracticeMenuPage; add no extra Supabase reads/writes and no session DB writes
Use a separate pure menuView helper for static browse view-models rather than mixing menu-preview logic into session-state helpers

Limit this task to compact text tacit preview on the menu page; defer tacit body expansion, media preview, signed/private URL handling, admin authoring, debug console work, and runtime/store derived promotion
No any, as any, ts-ignore, eslint-disable, admin/game cross-import, display:none, or inline filter/map inside Zustand selectors

Reuse existing gameVariables.css tokens first; if tokenized styling is needed on the menu page, prefer importing existing variables rather than modifying the token file unless a missing token is proven
No extra changes outside the approved write set and the session-start dirty snapshot baseline
acceptance: A pure helper can derive stable per-step-group menu preview view-models from PracticeMenuBundle using step_groups, locations, and text tacit items sorted by display_step_no and sort_order
The helper excludes media-type tacit items and returns compact text preview data for each step group without React, Zustand, or Supabase imports
PracticeMenuPage keeps the existing menu details and safe start-session CTA, and adds a compact tacit preview section beneath the current step overview
If a step group has no text tacit items, the UI omits or empties the tacit preview cleanly without breaking the existing step overview
PracticeSessionPage, practiceStore, runtime, queries, sessionView, sim routes/pages, and PracticeAdminPage remain behaviorally unchanged

npx vitest run src/lib/practice/__tests__/menuView.test.ts, npx tsc --noEmit, npm run build, and npm run lint complete with no new warnings/errors beyond the pre-existing warning at src/hooks/useGameTick.ts:73 and the pre-existing non-blocking Vite chunk warning
